meaning: adj.未查明的,未弄清的,未经确定的
examples: The definition and theorems on unascertained continuous function between two unascertained topological Spaces are introduced.
The uncertainty of objective is divided into four kinds in this paper. There are randomness, fuzziness, greyness and unascertained.
An inquest in September 2011 concluded the cause of death was "unascertained".
The inquest at Oxford Coroner's Court was told the medical cause of death was unascertained but probably caused unlawfully by a third party.
The jury found that Mr Robertson died from an unascertained injury.
